'''gavate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:judgmatically|judgmatically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-v-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:judgmatically|judgmatically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gavate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:gavate|gavate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gavatesher|gavatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gavatesherĂ«m|gavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gavatero|gavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gavateshĂ«|gavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gavateshĂ«m|gavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigavatero|gokigavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigavateshĂ«|gokigavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigavateshĂ«m|gokigavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogavankerom|gogavankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogavankeshĂ«|gogavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogavankeshĂ«m|gogavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogavankeya|gogavankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gavaterom|gavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gavatemu|gavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gavateya|gavateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigavaterom|gokigavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigavatemu|gokigavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigavateya|gokigavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:gavavate|gavavate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gavavatesher|gavavatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gavavatesherĂ«m|gavavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gavavatero|gavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gavavateshĂ«|gavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gavavateshĂ«m|gavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigavavatero|gokigavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigavavateshĂ«|gokigavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigavavateshĂ«m|gokigavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogavavankerom|gogavavankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogavavankeshĂ«|gogavavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogavavankeshĂ«m|gogavavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogavavankeya|gogavavankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gavavaterom|gavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gavavatemu|gavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gavavateya|gavavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigavavaterom|gokigavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigavavatemu|gokigavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigavavateya|gokigavavateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:gĂŠvĂŠte|gĂŠvĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gĂŠvĂŠtesher|gĂŠvĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m|gĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠvĂŠtero|gĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠvĂŠtero|gokigĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gokigĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gokigĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogĂŠvĂŠnkerom|gogĂŠvĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«|gogĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gogĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogĂŠvĂŠnkeya|gogĂŠvĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠvĂŠterom|gĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠvĂŠtemu|gĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gĂŠvĂŠteya|gĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠvĂŠterom|gokigĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠvĂŠtemu|gokigĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigĂŠvĂŠteya|gokigĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafvafte|gafvafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gafvaftesher|gafvaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafvaftesherĂ«m|gafvaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafvaftero|gafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafvafteshĂ«|gafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafvafteshĂ«m|gafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafvaftero|gokigafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafvafteshĂ«|gokigafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafvafteshĂ«m|gokigafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogafvafnkerom|gogafvafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafvafnkeshĂ«|gogafvafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafvafnkeshĂ«m|gogafvafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogafvafnkeya|gogafvafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafvafterom|gafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafvaftemu|gafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gafvafteya|gafvafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafvafterom|gokigafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafvaftemu|gokigafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigafvafteya|gokigafvafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
